message:
Wire recall into Agent loop

Add optional genome parameter to AgentOptions. When present, the agent
calls recall(genome, goal) between Perceive and Plan, injecting memories
and routing hints into the system prompt via buildSystemPrompt's existing
recallContext parameter. Genome is also forwarded to subagents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
